consumerTone: plain English; educational musculoskeletal genetics context only; no diagnosis, injury-risk, pain-cause, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, imaging, lab, exercise-clearance, or treatment claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated musculoskeletal score, injury-risk model, pain model, arthritis model, EDS model, osteoporosis model, bone-density evidence, imaging evidence, lab evidence, exercise-clearance context, treatment context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for musculoskeletal-health validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable musculoskeletal models explicitly; do not infer injury risk, pain causes, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, bone density, imaging findings, lab findings, training response, exercise clearance, or treatment needs.

referenceResources.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

reportPurpose: Consumer musculoskeletal health context using derived ACTN3 and ACE evidence plus explicit injury, pain, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, imaging, lab, and model-unavailable framing.
